label: Foundation
description: Repo scaffold, docker-compose, CI, venv, environment wiring, health endpoints.

label: Collection
description: MSAL auth (Mode A delegated, Mode B SP), Resource Graph inventory, Cost Management 91-day pull, Advisor pull, pre-flight verdict engine.

label: Analysis
description: 12 heuristic rule engine, FindingsAssembler, AnalysisRun tracking, CAD savings estimates.

label: API
description: FastAPI service: auth, scans, findings, checkout, webhooks, billing portal, entitlements, admin endpoints. APIM integration.

label: Frontend
description: Vite + React 19 + Fluent UI v9. 10 screens. i18next. ConsentBanner. TierCard. FindingsTable. a11y WCAG 2.1 AA.

label: Billing
description: Stripe Checkout (Tier 2 one-time $499 and $150/mo subscription, Tier 3 $1499). Webhook lifecycle. EntitlementService. PaymentsRepo. StripeCustomerMapRepo.

label: Delivery
description: Delivery service: Jinja2 templates for 12 finding types, ZIP packager, Blob Storage upload, 24h SAS URL, SHA-256 verification.

label: Observability
description: Structured logging, Application Insights, Log Analytics, APIM usage metrics, GA4 events, Clarity session replay.

label: i18n and a11y
description: i18next 5 locales (en, fr-CA, pt-BR, es, de), multi-currency display (CAD/USD/BRL/EUR), WCAG 2.1 AA, axe-core CI gate.

label: Hardening
description: APIM entitlement cache (60s), pre-flight caching, rate limiting, idempotency keys, webhook signature validation, PIPEDA compliance, penetration testing.

label: Phase 2 Infra
description: Terraform private landing zone, customer-managed VNET, Private Endpoints, Lighthouse Mode C, BYO subscription onboarding.

label: Data Model
description: ACA data model seeding (build-time WBS tracker) and runtime layer integration (rules, feature flags, endpoint registry, settings).
